tasks.title: Angle Classification
tasks.description: A program that takes an integer representing an angle in degrees (from 1 to 180) and classifies it as "Acute", "Right", "Obtuse", or "Straight".

tasks.title: Leap Year Checker
tasks.description: Complete the logic to determine if a year is a leap year. A year is a leap year if it is divisible by 4, but years divisible by 100 are not leap years unless they are also divisible by 400.
